title: AIDEA Microfibre Cloth Pack of 8, Multifunctional Reusable Cleaning Cloths, Lint Free Streak Free Washable Cloth Duster for House, Kitchen, Car, Motorbike, Windows 30 x 30 cm
features: 【All-Purpose microfibre Cleaning Towels】AIDEA Cleaning Cloths are made of 87% Polyester 13% Polyamide. Softer, More Absorbent, Lint-Free. Great for removing dust, dirt, oil, smudges, Cleaning everything just with water, streak-free, lint-free, non-abrasive.

【Soft & Lint Free】Multifunctional Cleaning Cloths, and works with plain water. Ultra-soft, non-abrasive microfibre cloths will not scratch paints, coats or can be used on most surface areas in your home.
【Easy Clean and Durable】Edgeless microfibre Cleaning Cloths. It can increase the durability of the towel very well.

【Easy Care And Use】Comes in 5 colors enables you to color code for different cleaning tasks. Standard size: 30 x 30cm. Note that it needs to be washed with warm Machine Wash, do not bleach, do not tumble dry, do not dry clean.

【100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEED】Customer satisfaction is of utmost importance to us. We're confident you'll love our products, but if you're not 100% SATISFIED, our customer service team will work with you to make it right!
description: Product Description ULTRA VERSATILE The AIDEA microfibre cloths are perfect for all sorts of cleaning applications. Polish hard surfaces, absorb liquid spills and do just about anything else with these versatile cleaning cloths. Highest Absorbency The soft microfibre used in these cloths is super absorbent and made to trap dirt, grime, and other particles. Absorb water more & faster and dries faster than cotton, Safe for all hard surfaces. Effective Cleaning Under Wet and Dry Conditions Eliminate grease, grime, fingerprints, and food spills from countertops, appliances, stainless steel, cupboards, kitchen floors, and more with the highest-quality microfibre cleaning products available. High-Quality Material Ultra-soft, non-abrasive microfibre cloths will not scratch paints, coats or other surfaces. Perfect for Kitchen Cloth, Kitchen Towel, Drying Cloth, Microfibre Towel. Can be used for Kitchen, for Car, for Windows and Floor.
